title: Origins: Magi [Early Access]
description: Human that can craft and combine 50+ different Spells! As a Magi, I want to explore the world of Minecraft and collect notes of all the different Spells into my Spelltome! (For Fabric)
body:
# Magi (for Fabric, Minecraft 1.20.2) impact: 2, Icon: Light Blue Dye

_"Human that can craft and combine Spells! 
As a Magi, I feel the need to explore the world of Minecraft and collect notes of all the different Spells into my Spelltome!"_

### "Spellcrafting" (Item on Item Passive Power):
_"I am able to craft and combine Spelltomes!"_
-  [+] Combine Items with Books in your Inventory to Craft Spells! (With an Item, Right Click on Book)
-  [+] Many Spells work better in combination with other spells!
-  [-] I do not start with knowledge on all the spells. I need to find and unlock them myself!
-  [-] - Some Spells are harder to find than others!
-  [+] Combine Experience Bottle with Enchanting Table to Unlock Enchantment Spells.
-  [+] Combine Experience Bottle with Wither Skeleton Skull to Unlock Dark Magic Spells.

### "Mana" (Mana Passive Power):

 _"Mana is precious and hard to find, you need it to power your spells!"_
  
-  [-] I do not regen Mana. I need to take it from where it already exists in the world.
-  [+] When Choosing This Origin, I will also choose how I will gain Mana from these options:
- [+] **+ 100 Mana** from **Eating Apples**
- [+] **+ 2 Mana** from **Absorbing Heat from Water**
-  [-] If I cast Spells without having Mana, I will die fast.
-  [+] There are a few ways to gain mana, I just need to find the spells to unlock them!
-  [+] Hints: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Bamboo, Blue Ice, Lightning Rod, Flint and Steel, Echo Shard

</details>

Origin by Frucs inspired by the magic in [Frieren: Beyond Journey's End](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_kUFws-dHEI), The crazy item combinations in [The Binding of Isaac](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mzVGs5I3v8Q), a spell from [Harry Potter (Accio!)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x8mGxGwbXmc)

## Magi 0.55 How rare is it to find a Bad Magi in the Wild?

<details>
<summary>List of All Spells [0.54]</summary>

1. Accio (Primary)
1. Ascendio (Secondary)
1. Auserlese (Primary)
1. Balterie (Passive)
1. Bamboo (Passive)
1. Barrier (Passive)
1. Careful Harvest (Passive)
1. Clone Magic (Secondary)
1. Dev Mana Refill (Secondary)
1. Enchant Boat (Secondary)
1. Enchant Sword (Secondary)
1. Ender Chest (Secondary)
1. Erfassen (Primary)
1. Flame on Hit (Passive)
1. Flight (Passive)
1. Fürwehrer (Primary)
1. Invisibility (Passive)
1. Invisibility True (Passive)
1. Leadership (Passive)
1. Lightning Bolt (Primary)
1. Lightning Strike (Secondary)
1. Mana Transfer (Primary)
1. Mind Control (Primary)
1. NTSC (Passive)
1. Open Soul (Secondary)
1. Planeswalk (Passive)
1. Prospect Iron (Primary)
1. Reverse Velocity (Passive)
1. Rocks to Bullets (Primary)
1. Sense Loot (Passive)
1. Skooma (Passive)
1. Slippery (Passive)
1. Small Fireball (Primary)
1. Spellcrafting Enchantments (Special)
1. Spellcrafting Dark Arts (Special)
1. Steal Fire Mana (Primary)
1. Steal Life Mana (Primary)
1. Steal Water Mana (Primary)
1. Tallstep (Passive)
1. Telekinesis Aura (Secondary)
1. Transfigure Pickaxe (Secondary)
1. Transfigure Sword (Secondary)
1. Waterwalk (Passive)

</details>

# Spellcrafting Tutorials
<details>
<summary>Tutorial 1 - Your First Passive Spell, Waterwalk</summary>

1. Craft a **Book**
2. Combine **Book** with **Sand**
</details>

<details>
<summary>Tutorial 2 - Your First Offensive Spell, Small Fireball</summary>

1. Craft a **Book**
2. Combine **Book** with a **Fire Charge**
</details>

<details>
<summary>Tutorial 3 - Your First Mana Steal Spell, Steal Fire Mana</summary>

1. Craft a **Book**
2. Combine **Book** with a **Flint and Steel**
</details>

<details>
<summary>Tutorial 4 - Upgrade Your First Book with Slippery</summary>

1. Do **Tutorial 1** if you haven't already
2. Combine that **Book** with **Ice**
</details>

<details>
<summary>Tutorial 5 - Enchantments Spellcrafting</summary>

1. Craft a **Enchanting Table**
2. Combine **Enchanting Table** with a **Bottle of Experience**
</details>

<details>
<summary>Tutorial 6 - Your First Conjured Sword</summary>

1. Do Tutorial 5 if you haven't already
2. Hold your **Enchanting Table (Spellcrafting)**
`With this, You have new **Spellcrafting Recipes** Unlocked!`
3. Combine any Spelltome with a Diamond Sword
</details>
